We are given \( k_1 = 1.5 \), \( k_2 = 2.5 \), and \( \mathbf{E}_1 = 2\hat{x} - 3\hat{y} + \hat{z} \) V/m.  
The boundary is the yz-plane, so the normal is \(\hat{x}\). The tangential components of \(\mathbf{E}\) are continuous: \(E_{1y} = E_{2y}\) and \(E_{1z} = E_{2z}\).
